pi_items.verified_value: Emoncms - open-source web application for energy monitoring, part of OpenEnergyMonitor project
pi_items.source: https://github.com/emoncms/emoncms - verified as real software, docker-compose.yml uses openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest image

privileged_info_summary: The task is to add a 'Log to Feed' input process to the 'heatpump' input in Emoncms. The heatpump input exists under the 'home' node with an initial value of 800 watts and no processes configured. The admin user has credentials admin/admin, and Emoncms is accessible at http://localhost. The agent should create a new PHPFina feed named 'Heat Pump Log' and attach the 'Log to Feed' process (process code 1) to the heatpump input pointing to this feed. The heatpump input is seeded with 30 days of synthetic historical data at 10-second intervals.
